constraint_doc: requirements.md + CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md; R.43 matrix reconciliation after R.39-R.43 strict evidence backfill
candidate_completion_rate: 45/45 candidate (45 entries have either strict complete or implemented_candidate paths)
r4_bug_fixes: Bug 1: /api/tasks/[id] 100% 404 → 接 unified_tasks 真实查
Bug 2: /api/search 404 → 显式 not_implemented 路由 + blocker banner
Bug 3: /api/sites 100% mock → 真实读 unified_sites + 派生 fallback
Bug 4: executor L342 假执行 → schema 检测 + dry_run_success/unsupported 显式
Bug 5: priority commandType 缺失 → 加 task_priority_restore (6 原子)
Bug 6: R.2 out_of_scope 违规 → REQ-2.2.2/3.2.1 改 blocked_by_auth
required_phrases: 已提交暂停命令 (UI 状态)

task_control_6_atoms.link_completion: control protocol 6/6; Agent pause/resume 2/6; remaining atoms unsupported
task_control_6_atoms.real_control_completion: 2/6 validated through standalone Agent against restored SH01 DB; production deployment pending
task_control_6_atoms.ui_completion: 2/6 actionable (pause/resume); reset remains visible but disabled
site_ddl_patches_required: ALTER TABLE tbl_task ADD COLUMN paused BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
ALTER TABLE tbl_task ADD COLUMN pause_reason TEXT
ALTER TABLE tbl_task ADD COLUMN paused_at TIMESTAMP
ALTER TABLE tbl_task ADD COLUMN priority SMALLINT DEFAULT 0
ALTER TABLE tbl_task ADD COLUMN priority_source TEXT
ALTER TABLE tbl_check_patrol_task ADD COLUMN source_id TEXT
ALTER TABLE tbl_check_patrol_task ADD COLUMN verify_result JSONB
ALTER TABLE tbl_check_patrol_task ADD COLUMN checksum TEXT
ALTER TABLE tbl_check_patrol_task ADD COLUMN checksum_algo TEXT
ALTER TABLE tbl_hot_restore_record ADD COLUMN source_id TEXT
ALTER TABLE tbl_hot_restore_record ADD COLUMN restore_priority SMALLINT DEFAULT 0
site_app_changes_required: deploy the verified Site Agent to production using HTTP poll/ack/result; no direct center DB access
pause/resume use the local adapter, persisted pre-pause status and immediate final-state sync
keep reset/priority/inspect/recovery unsupported until official schema/API semantics are approved

requirements.requirement_text: 集团层统一管控, 不替代各站点系统
requirements.backend_reality: 平台只做统一视图/管控, 写接口都标记为审计/模拟
requirements.ui_reality: Dashboard / Tasks / Racks / Volumes 全部展示统一视角

requirements.requirement_text: 松耦合 (API/MQ 交互, 不侵入站点核心逻辑)
requirements.backend_reality: R.43: Site Agent 通过 HMAC API 主动同步 package, 支持 control_command poll/ack/result；手动同步通过 /api/sync/trigger 写入 sync_request_log, Agent 拉取 sync_full/sync_incremental 后真实执行同步并回写最终状态。
requirements.ui_reality: 同步中心手动同步按钮提交真实请求, 文案为等待站点 Agent 拉取执行, 不宣称立即成功。

requirements.requirement_text: 站点配置 (名称/IP/状态/联系人)
requirements.backend_reality: R.30: 站点列表真实读取/派生；PATCH/DELETE 支持站点编辑、启用/禁用、删除并写 audit_log；配置仅保存 env key refs，不存 secret。
requirements.ui_reality: Sites 页面展示真实/派生来源、禁用写动作边界和一致性入口。
requirements.mock_or_simulator: N/A - real DB/API/UI/e2e evidence; no mock/simulator/DRY_RUN counted as completion

requirements.requirement_text: 站点切换 (SSO 免登)

requirements.next_action: 等 REQ-2.2.1 解锁

requirements.requirement_text: 站点监控 (实时 + 告警, 采集 ≤5 分钟)
requirements.backend_reality: GET /api/sync/sites/status: agent heartbeat, online/offline/stale detection (5min/15min), databaseReachable, agentVersion, spoolDepth. GET /api/alerts: aggregated from sync_package_log + sync_table_log + control_command. POST /api/site-agent/heartbeat: HMAC-verified agent heartbeat ingestion.
requirements.ui_reality: /sites page shows agent status, heartbeat time, database reachable. Floating assistant shows site health.
requirements.needed_site_schema_change: 站点推 tbl_site.status 变更 + 硬件节点表
requirements.next_action: 生产部署 Agent 后补离线/硬件告警源

requirements.mock_or_simulator: 无 mock 登录；ADFS/LDAP 为配置边界，未宣称完成

requirements.requirement_text: 新建备份/恢复任务
requirements.backend_reality: control_command table with FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED. Site Agent poll/ack/execute/result cycle. 6 command types (task_pause, task_resume, task_reset, task_priority_restore, task_inspect, sync_full, sync_incremental). PostgresSiteActionAdapter writes real tbl_task.status. ControlCoordinator manages execution lifecycle.

requirements.backend_reality: pause: SELECT FOR UPDATE + UPDATE tbl_task SET status=20. resume: restore previousStatus. Both with before/after snapshots and audit. Reset/priority/inspect: unsupported or blocked.
requirements.ui_reality: Pause/resume buttons in control-command-panel. Toast: '暂停命令已提交'.

requirements.backend_reality: R.36: 对 Tasks/Racks/Volumes/Logs/Users/Health 6 个关键 API 执行 20 并发，成功率 100%，平均 <1000ms，最大 <3000ms。
requirements.ui_reality: 关键页面依赖的 API 在 20 并发下无失败。
requirements.mock_or_simulator: N/A - real DB/API/UI/e2e evidence; no mock/simulator/DRY_RUN counted as completion

requirements.requirement_text: 数据同步时效 (增量 ≤10s / 全量 ≤30min)
requirements.backend_reality: R.43: Site Agent 增量同步请求在 e2e 中完成 Agent poll、执行、回写；sync_request_log 记录提交、拉取、完成时间, 用于同步时效验收。
requirements.ui_reality: /sync 可查看同步请求和日志状态。

requirements.requirement_text: 传输加密 (敏感字段)
requirements.backend_reality: JWT (HS256) HttpOnly session cookie. HMAC-SHA256 for site-control endpoints (verifySiteControlRequest). Auth middleware (requireSession/requirePermission/requireSiteAccess). TLS documented as deployment requirement.
requirements.ui_reality: All protected APIs return 401 without auth. Site-control returns 401 without HMAC.
requirements.next_action: R.19 不落 secret，R.25 请求级 HMAC 和传输验收

requirements.requirement_text: 存储加密 (不可逆 + 分区隔离)
requirements.backend_reality: Passwords stored as scrypt hash (scrypt$N=16384,r=8,p=1$...). API responses never include password_hash. Site partition via getVisibleSites RBAC. credential_key_ref for site secrets (no plaintext).
requirements.ui_reality: auth/me and auth/accounts responses verified no password_hash or scrypt in JSON.
requirements.next_action: 设计存储加密和分区隔离策略

requirements.requirement_text: 操作审计 (不可篡改)
requirements.backend_reality: R.43: /api/audit/verify 持久化 audit_hash_chain 并与历史 hash 比对；e2e 插入审计记录、初始化 hash、篡改 action 后检测 tamperedIds, 恢复后通过。
requirements.ui_reality: 审计校验为 API 级能力, 可接入日志/审计页面。

requirements.requirement_text: 防越权 (跨站/跨部门)
requirements.backend_reality: R.29: 服务端 JWT session + permission + site access 中间件覆盖 tasks/racks/volumes/logs/users/control-commands 6 个关键 API；未登录 401，登录后按权限访问。
requirements.ui_reality: 受保护页面/API 使用真实 session，不再依赖 mock token。
requirements.mock_or_simulator: N/A - real DB/API/UI/e2e evidence; no mock/simulator/DRY_RUN counted as completion

requirements.requirement_text: 前端兼容 (Chrome/Firefox/Edge ≥1920)
requirements.backend_reality: R.35: 10 个关键页面 HTTP 200，viewport/lang/响应式断点白盒检查通过。
requirements.ui_reality: Dashboard/Tasks/Racks/Volumes/Search/Sites/Logs/Users/Settings/Sync 均可访问并包含响应式结构。
requirements.mock_or_simulator: N/A - real DB/API/UI/e2e evidence; no mock/simulator/DRY_RUN counted as completion

requirements.requirement_text: 接口兼容 (不修改原接口)
requirements.backend_reality: Adapter 模式, 不改原接口

requirements.requirement_text: 数据库兼容 (PG 17+, 不破坏原结构)
requirements.backend_reality: scripts/audit/source-schema-inventory.ts scans 170 tables from star_storage_db. docs/database-analysis/source-table-inventory-r46.md: complete inventory with row counts, keyword matching, integration decisions. Cross-referenced with disc_files.sql static schema.
requirements.ui_reality: N/A — audit/documentation deliverable

requirements.requirement_text: 日志 (运行/错误/审计分类)
requirements.backend_reality: R.34: /api/logs 聚合 sync_package/sync_table/sync_scheduler/sync_consistency/control/audit/login_audit 多类日志，支持 keyword/errorCode/deviceId/taskType/siteCode/status/date。
requirements.ui_reality: Logs 页面 7 类日志 Tab、筛选和导出入口真实接 API。
requirements.mock_or_simulator: N/A - real DB/API/UI/e2e evidence; no mock/simulator/DRY_RUN counted as completion

requirements.requirement_text: 监控 (CPU/内存/磁盘/接口)
requirements.backend_reality: GET /api/system/metrics: CPU/memory/disk/process metrics via Node.js os module. GET /api/sync/sites/status: agent runtime (databaseReachable, version, spoolDepth, consistency status). GET /api/alerts: 3 alert sources aggregated.
requirements.ui_reality: /sites page shows agent runtime metrics. /settings shows system health.

requirements.requirement_text: 配置 (同步周期/告警阈值可页面配置)
requirements.backend_reality: GET /api/system/config: system configuration CRUD. GET /api/sync/config: sync interval/configuration. sync_sites.sync_interval_seconds: per-site sync interval. auth_system_config: login lock threshold/minutes configurable.
requirements.ui_reality: /settings page reads and writes sync config. Config values drive scheduler behavior.

r18_audit.decision: Site Agent may actively poll central commands and execute through a replaceable local DB/API adapter
r18_audit.production_boundary: central platform does not directly connect to or modify production site databases
r18_audit.completion_claim_policy: Site Agent deployment and end-to-end evidence required before complete

r38_matrix_reconciliation.summary: Backfilled R.27-R.37 PASS reviews into the canonical traceability matrix; completion rate is 15/45 = 33.3%.
r38_matrix_reconciliation.boundary: Does not count ADFS/LDAP, ES/ClickHouse, production deployment, unsupported control atoms, or DRY_RUN simulator as complete.

r43_matrix_reconciliation.summary: R.39-R.43 strict matrix backfill after Agent final-state and audit hash-chain verification.
